containerOverrides.name: wordpress-container
command:
echo '=== as3cf_settings ==='; wp option get as3cf_settings --path=/var/www/html --allow-root; \
         echo '=== attachments ids (first 20) ==='; wp post list --post_type=attachment --format=ids --path=/var/www/html --allow-root | awk '{print $0}' | cut -d' ' -f1-20; \
         echo '=== dry-run search-replace (S3 -> CloudFront) ==='; \
         wp search-replace 'https://wordpress-media-prod-200.s3.amazonaws.com/wp-content/uploads' 'https://d3r8wzoxc4rhkk.cloudfront.net/wp-content/uploads' --skip-columns=guid --precise --recurse-objects --dry-run --path=/var/www/html --allow-root; \
         wp search-replace 'https://wordpress-media-prod-200.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/wp-content/uploads' 'https://d3r8wzoxc4rhkk.cloudfront.net/wp-content/uploads' --skip-columns=guid --precise --recurse-objects --dry-run --path=/var/www/html --allow-root; \
         echo 'done'; sleep 2
